lesson.menu_title: Eating Out -- At the Café Counter
lesson.menu_desc: Snacks, drinks & paying at the counter -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 20 -- Eating Out -- At the Café Counter
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gabriela Paulucci | Aula 20 -- Eating Out -- At the Café Counter

listenings.text: Good afternoon, and welcome to City Cafe. Here is some information for you today. Come to the counter to order. We have fresh sandwiches, warm muffins, and cookies. For drinks, we have soda, water, and juice. You can eat your snack here, or you can take it away. When you order, we ask: For here or to go? Please have your money ready. Thank you, and enjoy your visit.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Today I am tired after my trip around the city, so I go to a small cafe. I walk to the counter and I look at the snacks. I want a sandwich and a cookie. I say: A sandwich and a cookie, please. The server asks: Anything else? I say: A soda, please. That is all. The server asks: For here or to go? I say: For here, please. I pay, and I get my change. Then I sit down and I enjoy my snack. The cafe is quiet and nice. I am very happy.

extra_audio.text: First, Gabriela walks to the counter and looks at the snacks. Then she says: A sandwich and a cookie, please. After that, the server asks: Anything else? Next, Gabriela says: A soda, please. That is all. Finally, she pays, gets her change, and enjoys her snack.
